approvedBy: Steve continuous-builder priority + Codex Foundation builder session
approvalSource: Steve prioritized COURSE-SOURCE-AUTH-BOUNDARY-001 after Build Intel creator watchlist expansion, with explicit instruction to avoid live extraction, private auth, paid access, external writes, Drive mutation, Gmail/ClickUp sends, and Agent Feedback auto-send unless separately approved.
scopeSummary: Define the private/course source-auth approval boundary, metadata-only preflight rules, required approval packet fields, focused dogfood, verifier coverage, and no auth/extraction/model/output side effects.
notApproved: Do not log into or use private, paid, community, course, Skool, MyICOR, Loom, or authorized-browser sessions.
Do not crawl sources, fetch transcripts, capture screenshots/keyframes, download source content, summarize content, or call a model.
Do not write Research Inbox items, create KB drafts, create atoms, create action routes, or mutate backlog from extracted content.
Do not install, run, or integrate OpenHuman or Harlan runtime work.
Do not mutate Drive, Gmail, ClickUp, Slack, Agent Feedback, or external systems.
Do not launch hidden subagents or parallel builders.
